title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. amplexifolium
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. amplexifolium, also known as the Jurassic Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion-like flowering plants in the sunflower family. This plant is rich in flavonoids, such as luteolin and apigenin, which are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium jurassicum subsp. amplexifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb to be used in herbal remedies, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
